Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}I knew it. Conducting raids against our enemies is a highly efficient tactical strategy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} has[n]increased after reading about the[n]main character's righteous spirit...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}It's almost bedtime. We should return to our rooms.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}It's amazing how combat-effective these raids are.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} has[n]increased after reading about the[n]main character's righteous spirit...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}Ah, it's almost time to go to sleep. We should head back to our rooms.[n]{f 1 1}
